#Initial Setup/Package installation 
install.packages(c(
  "Seurat",
  "tidyverse",
  "patchwork",
  "pheatmap",
  "glmnet",
  "caret",
  "viridis"
))

if (!require("BiocManager"))
    install.packages("BiocManager")

BiocManager::install(c(
  "SingleCellExperiment",
  "GSVA",
  "clusterProfiler"
))

#Add data retrieval or files here 

##Seurat Object 
library(Seurat)
'''
counts <- Read10X(data.dir = "data/raw/")

mel <- CreateSeuratObject(
  counts = counts,
  project = "Melanoma_ICB",
  min.cells = 3,
  min.features = 200
)
'''
#Load in meta data
meta <- read.csv("metadata/clinical_metadata.csv")

mel <- AddMetaData(mel, metadata = meta)

#Mitochondrial % filtering 
mel[["percent.mt"]] <- PercentageFeatureSet(
  mel,
  pattern = "^MT-"
)
#Filter out low quality cells, need to double check rna perimeters 
mel <- subset(
  mel,
  subset =
    nFeature_RNA > 300 &
    nFeature_RNA < 5000 &
    percent.mt < 15
)
##Normalization 
mel <- NormalizeData(mel)

mel <- FindVariableFeatures(
  mel,
  selection.method = "vst",
  nfeatures = 2000
)
#scale (check this) 
mel <- ScaleData(mel) 

#This needs to change to match ast project parameters etc 
mel <- RunPCA(mel)
ElbowPlot(mel)

mel <- FindNeighbors(mel, dims = 1:20)

mel <- FindClusters(
  mel,
  resolution = 0.5
)
#UMAP 
mel <- RunUMAP(
  mel,
  dims = 1:20
)

DimPlot(
  mel,
  reduction = "umap",
  label = TRUE
)
##Marker Identification 
#check only.pos parameter 
markers <- FindAllMarkers(
  mel,
  only.pos = TRUE
)

#Compare volume of cells in each cell type in responders vs non-responders 
#Diff exp of known immunotherapy assoc genes
